title: IGNOU June 2026 TEE Revised Date Sheet OUT

detail.title: IGNOU June 2026 TEE Revised Date Sheet OUT
detail.short_info: IGNOU has released the revised June 2026 TEE date sheet at ignou.ac.in. Check exam dates, morning/evening sessions, course-wise schedule and download the official PDF.

sections.heading: IGNOU June 2026 TEE Revised Date Sheet OUT

content.text: Indira Gandhi National Open University (IGNOU) has officially released the revised date sheet for June 2026 Term-End Examination (TEE). The exams are scheduled to be conducted from 01 June 2026 to 21 July 2026. Students can check the complete revised schedule on the official website - ignou.ac.in.

The revised date sheet includes morning and evening sessions for various programmes and courses. Eligible students can download the official PDF using their enrolment number or by visiting the examination section on the IGNOU portal.
Students are advised to verify all details carefully from the official source and contact the university in case of any discrepancy.

sections.heading: IGNOU June 2026 TEE Revised Date Sheet Overview

content.text: IGNOU has released the revised June 2026 TEE date sheet for students enrolled in various undergraduate, postgraduate, diploma and certificate programmes. The Term End Examination will be held in offline mode across the country.

rows: Morning (10:00 AM - 1:00 PM) & Evening (2:00 PM - 5:00 PM)

sections.heading: IGNOU June 2026 TEE Revised Date Sheet 2026 Schedule

content.text: The IGNOU June 2026 TEE revised date sheet covers multiple dates with specific course codes scheduled in morning and evening shifts. Students should check the exact dates for their respective programmes and courses from the official notification.
Note: The above is a sample. Students must download the complete revised date sheet PDF for full course-wise schedule.
Direct Link to Download IGNOU June 2026 TEE Revised Date Sheet Here

links.text: Direct Link to Download IGNOU June 2026 TEE Revised Date Sheet Here

sections.heading: How to Download IGNOU June 2026 TEE Revised Date Sheet

content.text: Students can easily download the IGNOU June 2026 TEE revised date sheet from the official IGNOU website. The process is simple and quick.

items: Visit the official website ignou.ac.in.
Go to the Student Zone or Examination section on the homepage.
Locate and click on the link for June 2026 TEE Revised Date Sheet.
The PDF will open in a new tab. Read all important instructions carefully.
Click the download option to save the file on your device.
Take a printout of the relevant pages for your courses and keep it safe.

content.text: Always check the official timetable carefully and keep a printed copy handy for your exam preparation.

sections.heading: Details Mentioned in IGNOU June 2026 TEE Revised Date Sheet

content.text: The official revised date sheet notification contains all essential information regarding the June 2026 Term End Examinations.

items: Exact Exam Dates and Day-wise Schedule
Morning and Evening Session Timings
Course Codes and Programme-wise Exam Dates
